A Letter For You

Open it when you're ready

Tap to open 💌

Dearest Vedant,

I don't know how to write this without sounding like every cliché I've ever rolled my eyes at — but here we are, and I mean every word.

You walked into my life and rearranged everything quietly. You didn't try to. That's the part I treasure most. You just exist, and somehow the world around you gets better.

On your birthday, I want you to know this: you are not just adored — you are seen. Your laugh, your weird little habits, your overthinking at midnight, your sincerity in everything you do — all of it.

I don't have grand promises. I just have today, and tomorrow, and every day I get to call you mine. That's enough. That's everything.

Happy Birthday, Vedant. This one's for you — every part of it.

Forever yours, Samriddha ❤️

❤️

You mean everything
to me ❤️
